title: Deploy Vercel sidecar cron for Appwrite database keepalive
one_liner: Create a standalone Vercel cron worker in tools/vercel-db-keepalive/ that pings Appwrite on a schedule, keeping the hosted database active without deploying the main local-first app.
acceptance_criteria: tools/vercel-db-keepalive/api/keepalive.js exists and pings Appwrite with CRON_SECRET validation
tools/vercel-db-keepalive/vercel.json exists with cron schedule configured
Keepalive cron does not require deploying the main tracks application
Vercel deployment is scoped to tools/vercel-db-keepalive/ subdirectory only

perceive.current_state: Appwrite hosted database requires periodic pings to stay active. No automated keepalive exists. Main tracks app is local-first and should not be deployed to Vercel.

steps: 1. Create tools/vercel-db-keepalive/api/keepalive.js: validate CRON_SECRET header, ping Appwrite endpoint with API key, return 200
2. Create tools/vercel-db-keepalive/vercel.json: cron schedule (e.g. every 5 minutes), function route for /api/keepalive
3. Add APPWRITE_KEEPALIVE_API_KEY and CRON_SECRET to .env.template with placeholder values
4. Deploy via: cd tools/vercel-db-keepalive && vercel deploy --prod
5. Verify cron fires by checking Vercel function logs after first scheduled run

done_when: tools/vercel-db-keepalive/api/keepalive.js exists with CRON_SECRET guard and Appwrite ping
Vercel function logs show successful ping after deployment
